decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id (project_34th-st-sbs-2012) already matches an existing registry record with the same record_id, same project_name ('34th Street Select Bus Service'), same project_type ('Select Bus Service'), same borough (Manhattan), same description, and shared source_id (120418_brt_cb4_34th_street). The observation confirms this existing record; no different target is needed. Other 34th Street records in the registry represent distinct projects: a 2008 bus-priority initiative (project_34th-street-bus-priority), the later busway (project_34th-street-busway), an enhanced bus priority study (project_34th-street-enhanced-bus-priority), and a transitway concept (project_34th-street-transitway-concept).

evidence_refs.source_quote: 34 th Street SBS Presentation to Manhattan CB 4 Transportation Committee
Since last fall, DOT & NYCT have ... – Implemented off-board fare collection – Completed environmental review – Released the Project Analysis Report – Initiated design work of the project
